reviews.comment:
Como puede ser que no tengan generadores eléctricos para casos de corte de electricidad para los surtidores? La gente varada sin nafta esperando por horas para que vuelva la luz... Ese es el servicio para los socios?

(Translated by Google)
How is it possible they don't have generators for power outages at the gas stations? People are stranded without fuel, waiting for hours for the power to come back on... Is this the service they offer their members?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3anI3NXdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un despelote. No había luz...falta generador y es bastante desordenado, la playa está bastante deteriorada

(Translated by Google)
A complete mess. There was no electricity...they're missing a generator and it's quite disorganized, the beach is pretty run down.

reviews.comment:
Buena organización, lo que logra una  muy buena atención en momentos donde la afluencia de clientes es muy grande.
Recomendable para cargar combustible, aunque los baños dejan mucho que desear.

(Translated by Google)
Well-organized, which allows for excellent service at times when there's a lot of traffic.
Recommended for fueling up, although the restrooms leave a lot to be desired.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRc3JEaF9nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención de la empleada del.shop . Atendia de mala manera, sin ganas, como apurada. Los precios te caros

(Translated by Google)
The shop employee provided terrible service. She was rude, unenthusiastic, and seemed rushed. The prices were expensive.
